user_query:
Please audit the provided React Native for OpenHarmony snippets for performance issues and deliver both a findings report and fixed code. Read all inputs from input/:
- input/App.txt — main component with render/setState patterns
- input/ListScreen.txt — list rendering snippet
- input/ArkTSPage.txt — ArkTS page hosting the React Native view
- input/build_config.json — current bundle configuration

Do the following and write all outputs under output/ exactly as named:
1) Create output/rnoh_report.json as a JSON array of findings. Each finding must include: ruleId (use the rnoh-* rule IDs), file (one of the input file names), and a brief description. At minimum, identify issues that correspond to: render/pure-memo usage, inline props/callbacks, merging setState calls, avoiding unchanged setState, list key stability, lifecycle foreground/background wiring, and production bundle flags.
2) Produce corrected code files with the fixes applied:
   - output/fixed/App.fixed.txt — apply: use PureComponent or React.memo for the child; replace inline callbacks with stable ones (e.g., useCallback or bound handler); move inline style objects into a StyleSheet; merge async setState via Promise.all; and avoid calling setState when the value would not change (skip the update when unchanged).
   - output/fixed/ListScreen.fixed.txt — ensure list items have stable unique keys (no array index as key).
   - output/fixed/ArkTSPage.fixed.txt — wire RNAbility visibility so onPageShow calls onForeground() and onPageHide calls onBackground().
   - output/fixed/build_config.release.json — update to use production bundle flags: set bundleDev to false and bundleMinify to true while keeping other fields if present.
3) Create output/README.md summarizing what you changed, grouped by ruleId.

Be careful to keep paths relative as shown and ensure the fixed code contains the concrete improvements (e.g., React.memo or PureComponent, useCallback or bound handlers, StyleSheet.create, Promise.all merge, and lifecycle calls).
